step_rationale: Serine-protease inhibitor; thrombin and factor IXa inhibition; elevated in AMI exosomes.
mechanism: SERPIND1 inhibits thrombin and intrinsic tenase, regulating coagulation amplification during acute MI.

references.title: Proteomics Analysis of Five Potential Plasma-derived Exosomal Biomarkers for Acute Myocardial Infarction.
Loss of Biglycan Enhances Thrombin Generation in Apolipoprotein E-Deficient Mice: Implications for Inflammation and Atherosclerosis.
